# Remedy Plumbing & Heating LLC

> Honest, friendly plumbing service for homeowners and businesses across Fond du Lac and eastern Wisconsin. Flat-rate pricing, fast water heater replacement, and a Wisconsin Master Plumber on every job. "The Plumber With The Cure."

- **Website:** https://remedyplumbingllc.com/
- **Phone / Text:** 920-960-2133
- **Location:** Fond du Lac, WI 54935 (serving a ~60-mile radius across eastern Wisconsin)
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday, 7am–5pm (no after-hours emergency service)
- **License:** Wisconsin Master Plumber, Lic. #943998
- **Established:** 2016 · Locally owned · Owner: Ian Seth
- **Promise:** Flat-rate pricing, clean job sites, 1-year labor warranty, and we always check your existing manufacturer warranty before quoting a replacement.

## Services

- [Water Heater Replacement](https://remedyplumbingllc.com/water-heater-replacement.html): Gas, electric, and hybrid heat-pump tanks installed, usually within 24 hours. Hard-water region expertise.
- [Residential Plumbing](https://remedyplumbingllc.com/residential-plumbing.html): Leaks, fixtures, toilets, faucets, sump pumps, and remodels for the home.
- [Commercial Plumbing](https://remedyplumbingllc.com/commercial-plumbing.html): Apartment buildings, restaurants, salons, offices, and property management groups.
- [Sump Pump Services](https://remedyplumbingllc.com/sump-pump-services.html): New installs and emergency replacements, plus discharge-line winterization.
- [Toilet Repair & Replacement](https://remedyplumbingllc.com/toilet-repair-replacement.html): Flat-rate installs on most models; repairs for running, leaking, and wobbling toilets.
- [Pipe Repair & Leak Repair](https://remedyplumbingllc.com/pipe-repair-leak-repair.html): Frozen pipe bursts, slow drips, basement leaks, and corroded lines.
- [Garbage Disposal Services](https://remedyplumbingllc.com/garbage-disposal-services.html): Quick replacements of humming, leaking, or jammed disposals.
- [New Construction & Remodeling](https://remedyplumbingllc.com/new-construction-remodeling.html): Full-home rough-ins, kitchen and bath remodels, additions, and commercial buildouts.

## Company

- [Home](https://remedyplumbingllc.com/index.html): Overview of Remedy Plumbing, top services, and how to reach us.
- [About](https://remedyplumbingllc.com/about.html): Company story, founder background, and credentials.
- [Contact / Free Quote](https://remedyplumbingllc.com/contact.html): Phone, service area, and a request-a-quote form.
- [FAQ](https://remedyplumbingllc.com/faq.html): Common questions on pricing, scheduling, warranties, and seasonal plumbing care.

## Service Area

Based in Fond du Lac, WI, serving a ~60-mile radius including Oshkosh, Waupun, Appleton, Sheboygan, West Bend, Green Bay, Madison, and the northern Milwaukee suburbs (Whitefish Bay, Richfield).
